title: 10 Pieces Makeup Spatula Scoop Stainless Steel Depotting Spatula Double-Headed Makeup Spatula Tool for Mixing Cosmetics
description:
Package content: comes with 10 pieces stainless steel makeup spatula scoops, all of them are in silver color, sufficient quantity for you to apply in daily life and meet your replacement needs
Sturdy material: the double-headed makeup spatulas are made of quality stainless steel, which are rust proof and won't corrode over time, with smooth surface, easy to wash under running water, clean and safe for you to apply
Double-headed design: double-headed design makes the spatula easy and comfortable to handle without worrying about it slipping out of your hand, the pointed tip will get into the hard to reach corners of the packaging, loosening it up, and the flat end will easily mix and stir
How to apply: just apply appropriate amount of foundation, eye shadow and other beauty products to a palette with the stainless steel spatula, more convenient to apply makeup, you can also use it to create special effects like those seen in movies
Applicable occasions: using the spatula to mix concealer, easy to cover up acne mark; Using the spatula to mix eye shadow, your eye makeup will be more attractive; Using the spatula to blend foundation, your skin will look soft and natural, just apply it whenever you need, you will find it rather helpful
reviews_5s: These are great for use in my business. They definitely get the job done.I got this to mix my potted gels. They aren't really thin at the ends, they're about 1-2mm thick. Otherwise, they are very sturdy and mix things well.
